message:
feat(stdlib): improve json.dumps and fix allocator detection

- Add dumpsValue() generic function to handle native Zig types (strings, ints, bools, null)
- Update json codegen to use dumpsValue for primitives instead of dumpsDirect
- Add ModuleFunctionsUsingAllocator map for json/re module functions
- Add AllocatorConstructors for collections types (Counter, deque, etc.)
- Fix callUsesAllocatorParam to detect module.function() calls that use allocator
- Add collections constructors to AllocatorBuiltins

Tests passing:
- math module: 50 tests
- json.dumps: 8 tests
- operator module: 29 tests
